name: taiwan-biz-research
description: Taiwan business-case research, data through recommendation. Data (free government open data, with ROC-year / broken-TLS / HTTP-200-that-isn't-data pitfalls wrapped): NDC business-cycle light with components (1984-), household income/spending/mix by county (1976-), listed-company monthly revenue, export orders, VAT sales by 3-digit industry incl. SMEs, and a four-axis consumer purchasing-power tier — comprehensive income tax by county/bracket/village, educational attainment to village, and age structure — plus a fetch cache and field-level (schemas) and dataset (datasets) reference indexes. Method: a decision-oriented framework router that says which frameworks Taiwan's free data cannot support, and a multi-agent workflow that scopes a case into falsifiable claims, cross-checks independent sources, and adversarially refutes every claim before it ships.
